## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Visual fidelity
- [ ] Privacy/security
- [ ] Tests/maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run logic:distribution`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run test:visual`
- [ ] `MASTER_CODE=... npm run build`

## Privacy and safety checklist

- [ ] No student data is sent to any server.
- [ ] No backend, login, analytics, tracking, database, or runtime external AI call was added.
- [ ] Local save still requires an explicit student action.
- [ ] Delete still removes saved result and memo.
- [ ] Korean copy avoids fixed-personality, rank, grade, deficiency, and comparison language.
- [ ] Screenshots or logs use only synthetic/fixture data.

## Screenshots / artifacts

Add screenshots, visual diffs, or test artifacts for UI changes.
